description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold color-block design in red and black. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials with smooth and matte finishes, and the shoe includes a padded collar and tongue for added comfort. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with black laces, and the shoe has perforations on the toe box for breathability. The midsole and outsole are thick and robust, likely made from durable rubber, providing ample cushioning and support. The heel and side panels have sculpted overlays, adding both structure and visual interest. The overall appearance is modern and sporty, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A modern high-top sneaker in red and black with a thick rubber sole, padded collar, and standard criss-cross lacing. The design is bold and athletic, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sculpted overlays, padded collar, and the bold red and black color-blocking.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the perforated toe box, black laces in a criss-cross pattern, and the rounded toe shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color-blocking and overlays, with a clear view of the midsole's thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel, heel tab, and the wraparound design of the upper.
